source_pr.title: bindinfo: support disabled status for binding
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/32466

Problem Summary:
* Support the disabled status for the binding.
* update the status from using to enabled when upgrade

### What is changed and how it works?
* Support the disabled status for the binding.
* update the status from using to enabled when upgrade

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: // It appears in the main function to be set before any use of client-go to prevent data race.
failure_signature: // It appears in the main function to be set before any use of client-go to prevent data race.
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: bindinfo: support disabled status for binding.
fix_pattern: bindinfo: support disabled status for binding

evidence: evidence: // It appears in the main function to be set before any use of client-go to prevent data race.

files: bindinfo/bind_record.go, bindinfo/bind_test.go, bindinfo/capture_test.go, bindinfo/handle.go, bindinfo/handle_test.go, bindinfo/session_handle.go, bindinfo/session_handle_test.go, executor/bind.go, executor/builder.go, infoschema/tables_test.go, parser/ast/misc.go, parser/misc.go, parser/parser.go, parser/parser.y, parser/parser_test.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, planner/optimize.go, session/bootstrap.go, session/bootstrap_test.go, tidb-server/main.go
